title: Welcome from the Chancellors
description: Welcome from Duke Kunshan chancellors: Discover our global mission, U.S.-China education innovation, and campus community. Start your transformative academic journey.
text:
Welcome from the Chancellors
Messages from the Chancellors
Messages from the Chancellors
MESSAGE FROM THE CHANCELLORS
Welcome to Duke Kunshan University! Over the past 12 years, DKU has grown from a visionary idea into a vibrant intellectual hub of learning, in China, for the world. Our mission is to shape a more knowledgeable, innovative, inclusive and responsible world through education, research and global collaborations.
DKU was founded as a partnership between Duke University, Wuhan University, and the city of Kunshan by far-sighted leaders who recognized a unique opportunity to make a lasting impact on our global future. Today, our students, faculty, and staff continue to embody this mission—from providing clean drinking water and sustainable energy systems for rural communities to developing preventive measures against future pandemics and fostering cross-cultural understanding.
At the heart of everything we do is the DKU SPIRIT: service grounded in knowledge and empathy; professionalism; an ethos of integration that celebrates every culture; resilience that endures challenges; innovation that serves a greater good; and transformation that knows no bounds in its aspiration.
In just over a decade, the university has established a strong tradition of offering high-quality liberal arts undergraduate and interdisciplinary graduate programs, all grounded in our core mission: to prepare students for impactful leadership roles worldwide and to empower them to lead purposeful, productive lives. Further, DKU enriches its academic offerings through cutting-edge research projects, service learning, global study opportunities, faculty exchanges, and forums that address pressing global challenges and foster collaboration across borders. We are also proud to be included in China's national Yangtze River Delta Regional Integration Development Plan and to have achieved QS 5 Star status.
We invite you to learn more about our university and the wonderful people who study, teach, and work here. Please explore the unique opportunities DKU offers, and join us in our mission to make higher education a force for improving lives, advancing knowledge, and promoting greater understanding across our planet in the 21st century.
Dr. Yaolin Liu
Chancellor Duke Kunshan University
Dr. John Quelch
Executive Vice Chancellor & American President Duke Kunshan University
Dr. Yaolin Liu
Chancellor Duke Kunshan University​
Dr. John Quelch
Executive Vice Chancellor & American President Duke Kunshan University ​
